retry_reason: On -EPROBE_DEFER the driver core retries probing; on -ENOENT the property is missing so retry is pointless.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference to a remote processor (rproc) specified by the 'qcom,rproc' device tree phandle via rproc_get_by_phandle(). It stores the rproc pointer in ab_ahb->tgt_rproc, transferring ownership of the reference to the caller (the driver). The caller must later release the reference using rproc_put(ab_ahb->tgt_rproc) when the rproc is no longer needed. On failure, returns -ENOENT if the DT property is missing, or -EPROBE_DEFER if the rproc is not yet available; the caller should propagate -EPROBE_DEFER to trigger deferred probe. There is no RCU or lock requirement for this acquisition.
